report.summary: Cycle v12: build-v12 shipped ZKML + AI Agent Identity guides, design-v11 created 2 OG images, community-v11 drafted social content. 2 'use client'+metadata bugs remain (unichain, appchains). Git locks at 7.3 days — 0 commits, 0 deploys, 678 uncommitted changes. No regressions.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGES BUILT SINCE LAST EOD (v11): build-v12 added /learn/zkml-guide-2026 + /learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide. Both are proper server components with Metadata export, StructuredData, Breadcrumb — PASS.

CRITICAL BUG (carry-over): /learn/unichain-guide-2026 and /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 still use 'use client' with metadata export. Next.js silently ignores metadata in client components — SEO titles/descriptions NOT rendered.
3 pages missing BackToTop component: /learn/onchain-identity-guide, /learn/smart-contract-security-guide, /learn/bitcoin-supply-shock-guide-2026. Minor UX gap.
3 pages missing StructuredData + Breadcrumb: /learn/nftfi-nft-finance-guide-2026, /learn/solana-blinks-actions-guide-2026, /ecosystem/initia. These were scaffolded with older template.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES have no matching page.tsx — unchanged from v11. Will 404 if accessed.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true still masking 42+ TS errors. No regressions on existing published pages.
TOTAL: 1,110 page.tsx files, 446 slugs in published-pages.ts (341 with matching page.tsx, 103 orphans), 174 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE HEALTH: All 6 core routes have route.ts files — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.
CACHE: 5/6 routes have in-memory caching with TTLs. /api/defi-yields has NO caching — fetches upstream on every request. Carry-over P1.

FALLBACK DATA: /api/prices has fallback, /api/market-dominance has hardcoded fallback. 4/6 routes (/api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/defi-yields) have NO fallback data. /api/defi-yields is worst — no cache AND no fallback, returns 500 on upstream failure.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 routes wired to rate limiter. Library exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but unused. Carry-over P1 — now 40+ cycles unfixed.
X-CACHE-SOURCE: Only /api/prices and /api/market-dominance include diagnostic header. 4/6 routes missing it.
NO NEW DATA ISSUES this cycle — no API routes were modified.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: Git locks (HEAD.lock + index.lock) since Mar 16 — now 7.3 days. Cannot commit or push. No Vercel deploy possible.
LAST DEPLOY: e999560 (Mar 17, 6 days ago). Production running stale build.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 678 changed entries (47 modified tracked + 1,186 untracked). Local/production drift is severe and growing every cycle.
BUILD CONFIG: standalone output, NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192', ignoreBuildErrors:true. No vercel.json.
SINCE LAST EOD: build-v12 (ZKML + AI Agent Identity), design-v11 (2 OG images), community-v11 (social content) — all sitting in uncommitted working tree.
ACTION REQUIRED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commit → push → Vercel auto-deploy. Recommend staged commits to reduce regression risk from 1,200+ file diff.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE (since eod-v11): build-v12 produced 2 learn guides (ZKML + AI Agent Identity, ~6,200 words combined). design-v11 created 2 OG images + responsive/a11y fixes. community-v11 drafted Fed wipeout content series + newsletter v6.
NOT SHIPPED: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages promoted to production. All work accumulates in uncommitted working tree.
DAY 70 CUMULATIVE: 22+ learn guides built, 16+ OG images, 38+ social posts, 174 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE, 64 agent reports today. Massive output with zero deploy path.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7+ DAYS]: Git locks. Single point of failure blocking entire pipeline. Requires manual rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages with 'use client'+metadata bug (unichain, appchains) — need programmer fix before promotion.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any API route.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing cache + fallback.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, 3 pages missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb, 3 pages missing BackToTop.
NEXT CYCLE: Clear git locks → fix 2 client-component bugs → staged commit → promote queued pages → deploy.
